calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Setting Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For 1)Order For Accounting 2)Order For Suspension, Removal, And Replacement Of Trustee 3)Order To Quiet Title And For Recovery Of Trust And Estate Property Under Probate Code Section 850 4)Order Voiding Purported Trust Due To Lack Of Capacity 5)Undue Influence-Damages, And Invalidation Of Purported Trust 6)Order For Damages And Attorney'S Fees Under Welfare & Institution Code Section 15610.30 And Probate Code Section 859 7)Unjust Enrichment/Restitution
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jamie Ackerman for petitioner Randall Montanari (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for respondent Kira Montanari (via Zoom).

Counsel reported that the parties had reached a settlement. The Court noted that approval of the settlement was not required under the framing of the petition and confirmed that counsel requested the Court to retain jurisdiction pursuant to CCP Section 664.6.

The Court accepted the stipulation of the parties to retain jurisdiction and indicated that it would sign the proposed order that had been submitted. The underlying petition and status hearing on mediation were taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Verified Petition For 1)Order For Accounting 2)Order For Suspension, Removal, And Replacement Of Trustee 3)Order To Quiet Title And For Recovery Of Trust And Estate Property Under Probate Code Section 850 4)Order Voiding Purported Trust Due To Lack Of Capacity 5)Undue Influence-Damages, And Invalidation Of Purported Trust 6)Order For Damages And Attorney'S Fees Under Welfare & Institution Code Section 15610.30 And Probate Code Section 859 7)Unjust Enrichment/Restitution
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Continued To Oct-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Nagakawa for Randall Montanari, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for and with Kira Montanari, Respondent (via Zoom).

Counsel reported that the parties are engaged in discovery and have agreed to proceed to pro bono mediation and have selected mediator Bette Epstein from the court's probate panel. The Court agreed to issue an order providing the party with the Pro Bono Mediation Referral.

After discussing scheduling, the Court ordered that mediation be completed by September 15, 2025. The parties are to notify the assigned probate examiner of the status of mediation by October 6, 2025. A status hearing was set for October 13, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, on status of mediation. The underlying petition was continued to be heard on the same date.

Counsel was instructed to obtain a copy of the Order Referring Case to Pro Bono Mediation from the Court's website.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Setting Mediation
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Continued To Oct-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For 1)Order For Accounting 2)Order For Suspension, Removal, And Replacement Of Trustee 3)Order To Quiet Title And For Recovery Of Trust And Estate Property Under Probate Code Section 850 4)Order Voiding Purported Trust Due To Lack Of Capacity 5)Undue Influence-Damages, And Invalidation Of Purported Trust 6)Order For Damages And Attorney'S Fees Under Welfare & Institution Code Section 15610.30 And Probate Code Section 859 7)Unjust Enrichment/Restitution
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To Jun-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jamie Ackerman, Esq., for Randall Montanari, Petitioner.
Amanda Ebey, Esq., for Kira Montanari, Respondent.

At the court's query, Ms. Ackerman reports as to the status of Discovery. Ms. Ebey suggests a continuance of two (2) months to allow the parties additional time to complete Discovery. The parties report that they would be amenable to mediation. The court acknowledges the preceding and advises the parties that if they wish to use the court's pro bono mediation program prior to the next calling, the court will consider ordering mediation via a drop-off ex parte application. There is discussion about a mutually agreeable continuance date, and a date is confirmed.

The subject matter is continued to Jun-16-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Setting Mediation is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Verified Petition For 1)Order For Accounting 2)Order For Suspension, Removal, And Replacement Of Trustee 3)Order To Quiet Title And For Recovery Of Tr
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Continued To Apr-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey Z. Liu for Randall Montanari, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Amanda Ebey for and with Kira Montanari, Respondent (via Zoom).

The court inquired as to whether the parties were interested in pursuing mediation. Both sides expressed openness to mediation after conducting preliminary discovery. Ms. Ebey suggested a three-month continuance to allow the parties to engage in discovery, which Mr. Liu agreed to.

The court continued the matter to April 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
